work_wit.alt_title: Gospel of St. Mark Patriarch of Alexandria, may he be our advocate, amen amen amen
Gospel of the great and holy disciple, apostle, and theologian, John son of Zebedee, according to (the teaching of) our Lord Jesus Christ
